message:
style(abi,core): apply cargo fmt and clippy lint cleanup across 14 files

Remove unnecessary type casts, unused imports, and redundant unsafe
blocks identified by clippy and fmt:

ABI modules (11 files):
- Remove redundant 'as i64' / 'as c_long' casts on libc::syscall()
  calls where types are already inferred correctly
- Remove unnecessary unsafe blocks wrapping functions that don't
  require them
- Remove unused 'use std::sync::OnceLock' import from stdio_abi.rs

Core modules (3 files):
- ELF loader: merge nested if-let into match guard for SectionType::Strtab
- RCU: remove redundant .into_iter() call (iterator inferred from context)
- Regex VM: refactor nested if-let pattern into match guard clause

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
